Defines board-specific configurations for various Pebble hardware versions.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that manages the inclusion of board-specific configuration headers based on predefined macros. It uses conditional preprocessor directives to include the appropriate header file for different hardware board versions, such as `board_ev2_4.h`, `board_bb2.h`, and others. Each `#include` statement corresponds to a specific board version, ensuring that the correct hardware definitions and prototypes are used during compilation. If none of the board macros are defined, the code generates a preprocessor error indicating an unknown board definition. This structure facilitates platform abstraction and board definition management for different hardware configurations.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `boards/board_ev2_4.h`
- `boards/board_bb2.h`
- `boards/board_v1_5.h`
- `boards/board_v2_0.h`
- `boards/board_snowy_bb.h`
- `boards/board_snowy_evt.h`
- `boards/board_snowy.h`
- `boards/board_spalding_evt.h`
- `boards/board_silk.h`
- `boards/board_robert.h`
- `boards/board_asterix.h`
